headline: Find out how ready your business is for funding.
subheadline: Answer a short set of questions and get a public-safe readiness score, likely next steps, and a clear path to review.

sections.title: How it works
items: Review your readiness score and next steps.
Choose whether to request follow-up or a human review.

sections.title: What you get
items: A safe summary of possible funding paths.
A checklist of likely documents and preparation steps.

disclaimer: This scorecard is educational only and is not a lending decision, approval, offer, or commitment to lend.
